name: Hypergraph Context Engine
description: Task-state-guided context engine prototype for OpenClaw.

dbPath.description: Optional absolute or relative SQLite path for persisted semantic state.

disablePersistence.description: Disable SQLite persistence and keep state in memory only.

memoryWorkspaceRoot.description: Root directory where NOW.md, MEMORY.md, and memory/hot|warm|cold files are stored.

enableLayeredRead.description: Hydrate layered Markdown memory into memory_chunk nodes before assemble.

enableLayeredWrite.description: Write NOW.md and layered Markdown memory files during flushMemory.

enableQueryGate.description: Use conversation-aware query gating so short recall or low-information turns do not overuse long-term memory.

disableLongTermMemoryForConversationQuer.description: Keep conversation-style recall focused on transcript, task state, and session-hot memory instead of warm/cold global memory.

flushOnAfterTurn.description: Automatically flush layered memory after each turn.

flushOnCompact.description: Flush layered memory before compaction runs.

promoteOnMaintenance.description: Re-hydrate and apply lifecycle maintenance during afterTurn.

runtimeIdentityDebug.description: Append debug-only runtime identity diagnostics so real OpenClaw namespace alignment can be inspected during integration testing.
